saw_sequence_rule: Both sides simultaneous (twin-head); start at midpoint, weld outward both ends; 1st pass root, 2nd cap.
saw_operator_qual_status: WPQ valid (AWS D1.1, continuity within 6 months)
sequence_criteria: Start at midpoint, weld outward both ends, twin-head simultaneous (per WPS sequence rule)
sequence_obs: Both heads started at midpoint and welded outward simultaneously; sequence followed.
vt_criteria: AWS D1.1 Table 6.1 — no cracks, no undercut > 1mm, no porosity > permitted
vt_obs: Continuous bilateral fillets, no cracks, no undercut, no porosity observed.
bead_criteria: Convex / flat profile, leg length per WPS (6mm fillet)
bead_obs: Leg length 6.2 - 6.8mm measured at 5 points; convex profile uniform.
